Schematic of the entanglement swapping protocol between two partially entangled |η m⟩,|η p⟩ states, outputting an entangled state which is either |η m+p⟩ or |η m-p⟩. This setup of gates is what we will from now on refer to as the S operator, that acts upon four qubits and outputs two qubits. Whether the output is |η m+p⟩ or |η m-p⟩ can be determined by the measurements of second and third qubits. As we are not interested in what is the final state of a specific entanglement swap iteration, but rather in the possible states generated by it and its probabilities, we will not use that information.
